reviews.review_description: Either drop it or make a update it’s been in demo for almost 5 years.

developer_response.body: We have just released the Open Alpha for Heartlands: The Arena, Hope you enjoy it! Making scrollslike RPGs takes a long time.

reviews.review_description: It says the full game but, I downloaded, played and out of bandit camp, rode horse cart to town, it showed the title, then credits to my surprise after credits it started right back at the beginning before bandit knock you out and put you in a prison cell. Sadly this is not the full game as advertised. Extremely disappointing. This game had so much potential. Sad

developer_response.body:
This is the demo, the description say features FOR the full game which is not this. 
We hope you'll come back and play the beta when we release it in a bit.

reviews.review_description:
Firstly, this game has tons of potential - however it also needs a ton of work. 

The demo is ridiculously big for what is essentially one building. 

It’s buggy - which is to be expected for an early title sure, but I had to launch the game a few times before grabbing anything would work, and there were multiple times movement stopped until I spammed every button. 

You can also push your head through the cell bars and then walk straight out. 

That said, I can see tons of potential in the gameplay systems they’ve set up, and if development continues based on the description then it could be amazing - I just think the quest 2 might have been replaced come that point.

developer_response.body:
We appreciate the feedback! If you're willing to give it another shot, we've recently launched an update that includes new stages, features and bug fixes thanks to reviews like yours. AND the install size has been reduced to around 1.4 gb.
While you could certainly push your head through the bars and walk out of the cell, we've added an anti-cheat measure or two to discourage players from doing that :) 
As for movement it only stops when you are supposed to be doing a tutorial or talking to a character. If you'd like to skip tutorials or dialogue then you can just press B, or feel like you're stuck in place, press B. 
Development is in full swing and should be completed end of first quarter 2023.

reviews.review_description: the game make crashed my oculus quest 1 just after the intro scene in the cart, before I could do the tutorial or even play a bit

developer_response.body: Heartlands is not fully compatible with quest 1, Quest 1 is also being discontinued support by meta in 2024. We recommend you upgrade to a quest 2 or quest pro to fully enjoy the demo and full game later this year.

reviews.review_title: My last review was a little too harsh.
reviews.review_description:
Okay so I reviewed this game recently and I gave a harsh review, and I want to apologize to the devs. 

I played it a little further, and I find this game very interesting. The idea is very good and the game is still in devolopment I think. The combat is not supposed to be physics based, and I personally am not a big fan, because I have played physics based swordfighting game so its hard for me to get used to this. But I like the world, it is very good looking even though there are some bugs. I know the devolopers will fix these bugs. They are active to answering questions. The crafting system is cool. I will give 3 stars for now, I apologize for giving a harsh review, I didnt play this game enough but now I have played it a bit longer and I like it. Its an vr RPG game that the RPG lovers have been waiting for.

I really hope though that the devolopers would add a snap turning setting, of it isnt in the game yet. I will keep playing this game more and update this review.

developer_response.body: We appreciate the revised review and the apology. The team is only 6 devs and game development is hard a bit of kindness goes a long way <3. While the combat will remain non physics based we will be adding in more effects, animations, and better AI to make it feel better all around. We will look into adding snap turning as an option!

reviews.review_description:
The new tutorial & inventory system is really good. I especially like choosing a scroll to represent your personality. I am enjoying the dialog from the characters. Graphically this is quite nice, the style is slightly reminiscent of oblivion... Not a bad thing at all.

I did run into a few issues, the snap turning sort of "judders" when turning and when I started in the cell I kept falling through the floor so couldn't give the lock pick to my cell mate 

Even though I ran to a few issues I can see what the devs are going for and I'm really excited to see where this goes.

Here's hoping for epic main quests and weird AF side quests

developer_response.body: Thanks! We are going for an oblivion look and feel! We aren't sure what's happening with the judder you experienced or why you were falling through the floor we didn't experience that in any of our playtesting, but will look into it after the project is converted to use Unreal Engine 5. Don't worry we have a bunch of weird quests in the works!

reviews.review_title: Huge potential, still a long way to go
reviews.review_description: This is the closest to Skyrim VR that I can imagine in standalone VR. The graphics have a very unique retro look that I quite like. The game has a very peculiar inventory system with floating objects which is also used to interact with certain menus (eg "drop this scroll in your inventory to choose X option). This is cool but counterintuitive at first. I think it will work well but it needs some polish (eg I found myself opening and closing the inventory very rapidly without noticing). This leads me to a more general point: the demo is in a very premature state that doesn't do it justice. I got stuck and couldn't move twice (100% game breaking). Also, the snap turn made me fall through the floor systematically when I turned. These details have to be fixed. I'm a pretty hardcore VR player but never got used to smooth turning [shrugs], I can't be the only one. Finally, NPCs behaved strangely a couple of times (an invulnerable angry mob ran towards the jail in the beginning for no apparent reason). This creates frustration and will put off many players (I see many angry faces in the reviews).  So TL;DR: this has great potential but it needs a lot of work.

This is a great game, and oblivion was a great game. Just getting out of the cell is kinda hard, and the nausea from this game is quite bad, but I still love this game. Keep going with the updates, and one question: Will the full game be free or paid? Thank you for replying, and making Oblivion in vr.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! The full game will be paid. We plan to have two Early Access launches as well where you will be able to get the game cheaper than full retail.  It's quite expensive to make a game of this scale.

reviews.review_title: Loved the game just confused on somethin
reviews.review_description: So i loved the demo it was amazing but I've looked everywhere and can't find anything on the development of this game and all i could find was something saying it was supposed to come out in 2023 so it had me worried if this game was still being worked on still loved the demo though

developer_response.body:
Yes we are still actively working on the game, and will hopefully have something out soon. We don't really have a marketing department unfortunately (something we are working on) we are a super small team, so developing the stuff we are is taking a really long time. If you wanna maybe get faster updates you could join our discord which is admittedly still very new and empty, but we are trying to be active there! 

https://discord.gg/nTTQcFjE

reviews.review_description: I'm seriously enjoying this demo it's huge. Game is fun as I enjoy exploring crafting looting and some battles . Goods stuff so far.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review!  We released a new update for the demo as of October 28th. If you'd like to check it out: we've added new features like weapon holsters at your side to make battle easier & foraging for ingredients, to name a few. We also have added 3 new stages to the demo, bug fixes, and all while being able to reduce the install size from 5 gb to around 1.4gb!

reviews.review_description: I can’t get past the first few minutes of the game without getting kicked I’m getting old school oblivion vibes and would love to actually ply the game if anyone has any updates about this being fixed please let me know

developer_response.body:
Oblivion is the feel we are going for! We are still working on updating just taking a lot longer than expected. We have basically rebuilt the entire game from the ground up over the past couple years, new character models, new rendering system, new quest system, the works. You can join our discord if you want to get faster updates, but its recently launched so not mush there yet. 

https://discord.gg/wsp5TZ59

reviews.review_description: This is an excellent demo of what will hopefully be featured in the final game. I appreciate the variety of mini games and how good it looks for a game on the quest. I followed the tutorial and had no trouble getting through the dungeon and making it out to the city. I look forward to being able to walk around in the city itself and explore.

reviews.review_title: Please fix my game. I keep on crashing
reviews.review_description: Please tell me it’s during the tutorial

developer_response.body: Working on it!! We have a bunch of new stuff coming soon.

reviews.review_description: The Game has Potential and i think it's very good. It's an early Version but with a lot of work, i'm be sure it will be Fantastic.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review!  We released a new update for the demo as of October 28th. If you'd like to check it out: we've added new features like weapon holsters at your side & foraging to name a few. We have 3 new stages to the demo, bug fixes, and also have reduced the install size from 5 gb to around 1.4gb!

reviews.review_title: Good oblivion styled game but crashes
reviews.review_description: Listen I love the style and the intro and how it takes inspiration from Skyrim and oblivion but I can’t get past the tutorial with the ghost chick because of crashing I know you are gonna release an update to fix it in like a month or two but PLEASE fix the crashing now and release the update after at least that way people can still play and won’t be turned off by the crashing I have a whole discord server of around 200 people who were exited to play this but can’t now so please fix the crashing

developer_response.body: We are working as fast as we can to get this update out, but it isn't possible for us to just release a fix for this particular crash unfortunately as that build no longer exists in our build server. We promise the update will be worth it!

reviews.review_description:
The game crashes as soon as I get to the first tutorial after the guy gets hit with an arrow, could you please make a patch for this I really want to play this game.


Ok thank you very much for the information👍👍👍.

developer_response.body: We are sorry about the crash, we are still working on a major update which we expect to release within the next month or 2. It will not only fix the crash it also moves the project to unreal engine 5 updates the combat, improves graphical fidelity and a lot more.

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing and looks amazing, but I can’t get out of the tutorial because it keeps kicking me out when I try playing it. If you could fix this, that would be amazing.

developer_response.body: We are aware of this issue and are working to get an update out, although an update is an understatement. We have since moved to UE5 and have changed or upgraded nearly every system in the game! We look forward to showing it off as soon as possible!!

reviews.review_description: It crashes before it starts
i know about every reveiw is about the tutorial stop so when the update coming out?

developer_response.body: Sent the latest test build off last night, should be available within then next month or so. Excited for everyone to see it!

reviews.review_description:
To noone’s surprise, the ‘low memory’ issue isn’t isolated. I have a quest 2, with ample memory to spare and storage, all to run whatever I want to run; yet when it gets on Heartlands SOMETHING chugs it up or forces a crash it can only recognise as ‘low memory’. The response to check back in a few weeks to another reviewer also hasn’t helped.

fix pls

edit : I saw the very quick reply; which I think is a good sign. I have faith the developers are doing their best; even if I can’t play, I bumped up the stars to 4 because of this. Heartlands LOOKS good; it’s just sad I can’t experience it. Good luck.

developer_response.body: Still working on the update. The update has taken significantly longer than expected seeing as basically 90 percent of the demo has been ripped out and redesigned or reprogrammed, but we also still haven't been able to replicate this bug. Have someone playtesting right now, no crashes, just as frustrating for us as is it is for you. Rest assured we are working on it night and day to get the update out.
